form.formComment: Returns from a 38-day let-up. Last start 9th of 15 at Meydan in the G3 Nad Al Sheba Turf Sprint on February 28 over 1200m, 7 len behind Native Approach with 59kg at $23. The start before that won by 2.75 len at Jebel Ali LR February 15 over 1000m defeating Apollo One with 57kg at $7. Key runner who should be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up 7th of 10 at Cagnes-sur-Mer All Weather in LR on February 15 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind No Lunch with 56.5kg at $25. Second run from a spell won by 2 len at Chantilly All Weather March 8 over 1300m defeating Mise En Boite carrying 55.5kg at $4.60. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: Entire returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign tenth of 16 at Longchamp in the G1 Prix De La Foret October 5 over 1400m, soft track; 7 len behind Maranoa Charlie with 58kg at $8.60. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.75 len this track G1 Prix Maurice de Gheest August 10 over 1300m defeating Lazzat carrying 59.5kg at $27. Expected to go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7.5). Entire returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 5th of 10 at Chantilly All Weather on March 8 over 1300m, 6 len behind Stolen Kiss with 56kg at $5.10. Previously second-up 4th of 11 at this track in LR on April 8 over 1100m, 2.25 len behind Toyotomi with 57kg at $3. Will need to do a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Second run back. First-up after five months 5th of 10 at Chantilly All Weather on March 8 over 1300m, 6 len behind Stolen Kiss with 56kg at $5.10. form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six months. Finished off last campaign second of 17 at Longchamp in the G1 Prix De L'Abbaye De Longchamp October 5 over 1000m, soft track; 0.5 len behind Asfoora with 62kg at $33. Previous preparation first-up won by 2.5 len Praha June 22 over 1200m defeating Worth Choice carrying 57kg at $9.50. Looks hard to beat back in this easier level.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six months. Previous preparation first-up won by 2.5 len Praha June 22 over 1200m defeating Worth Choice carrying 57kg at $9.50. Looks hard to beat back in this easier level.

form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Finished off last preparation ran last of 12 at Del Mar Turf in the G1 Breeders' Cup Juvenile Turf Sprint on November 1 2024 over 1006m, 11 len behind Magnum Force carrying 55.5kg at $13.60. Won previous preparation first up settled well back; won by a nose at Beverley June 8 2024 over 1005m defeating Moving Force carrying 56.5kg at $2.50. Prefer to see some form before recommending.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 4th in a small field at Fontainebleau on March 13 over 1100m, slow going 4.5 len behind Lesslepasser carrying 54.5kg at $7.50. Previously second-up 6th of 8 at Marseille Vivaux on April 11 over 1500m, 8 len behind Stolen Kiss with 56.5kg at $11. Must respect.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation sixth of 12 at Chantilly in the G3 Prix De Seine-Et-Oise October 27 over 1200m, soft track; 10 len behind Spycatcher with 55kg at $6.80. On debut second of 9 at Saint-Cloud June 13 over 1600m, 1.3 len behind South Bay with 57kg at $8.50. Suited to this level so cannot be underestimated.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign won by 0.5 len at Cagnes-sur-Mer February 1 over 1300m on a soft track defeating Ten Horns with 56kg at $6.40. When resuming last campaign 4th of 13 at Saint-Cloud on March 29 2025 over 1600m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Familly with 58kg at $12. Hard to have in this tough line-up.
